items.description: Incoming refrigerated items temperature ≤ 4.4°C at time of receipt
items.evidence_required: Measure temperature of 3 random items from each refrigerated delivery

items.description: Supplier COAs (Certificates of Analysis) present for all high-risk items
items.evidence_required: Review receiving logs for COA documentation

items.description: No damaged or compromised packaging accepted
items.evidence_required: Visual inspection of packaging integrity

items.description: Walk-in cooler temperature ≤ 4.4°C
items.evidence_required: Check digital thermometer display and datalogger reading

items.description: Freezer temperature ≤ -17.8°C
items.evidence_required: Check digital thermometer display and datalogger reading

items.description: FIFO (First In, First Out) rotation practiced — oldest stock front
items.evidence_required: Check date labels on items; oldest should be accessible first

items.description: Temperature monitoring logs complete — entries ≤ 4 hours apart
items.evidence_required: Review HACCP-02 log for last 24 hours

items.description: All items stored ≥ 15cm off floor
items.evidence_required: Visual inspection — no items directly on floor

items.description: Chemicals stored separately from food items, in designated chemical storage area
items.evidence_required: Visual confirmation of separation

items.description: No evidence of pest activity (droppings, gnaw marks, nesting material)
items.evidence_required: Visual inspection of all corners, shelving, and floor

items.description: Handwashing stations stocked (soap, paper towels, warm water)
items.evidence_required: Check all 3 handwashing sinks — water temp, soap, towels

items.description: Color-coded cutting boards used correctly (no cross-contamination)
items.evidence_required: Observe staff practices; red for raw meat, green for vegetables

items.description: 3-compartment sink operational and sanitizer at correct concentration
items.critical_limit: Sanitizer at 200 ppm chlorine or equivalent
items.evidence_required: Test sanitizer with concentration strips

items.description: CCP-COOK-TEMP: Poultry reaches minimum internal temperature 73.9°C
items.evidence_required: Review HACCP-01 log for all batches today; spot-check thermometer reading

items.description: Cooking temperature log (HACCP-01) complete for all batches
items.evidence_required: Count log entries against batch records

items.description: Thermometers calibrated within last 7 days
items.evidence_required: Check calibration log and calibration date sticker on thermometers

items.description: CCP-RAPID-COOL: Cooling log (HACCP-03) complete for all cooked products
items.evidence_required: Review HACCP-03 for all batches; verify time/temp entries

items.description: Blast chiller functioning — reaches -18°C blast temp
items.evidence_required: Check blast chiller temperature display

items.description: CCP-METAL-DETECT: Metal detector operational, test piece verification logged
items.critical_limit: Test every 30 minutes with Fe 2mm, Non-Fe 2.5mm, SS 3mm test pieces
items.evidence_required: Review HACCP-04 metal detector log

items.description: Product labels accurate — ingredient list, allergens, date codes correct
items.evidence_required: Check 5 random finished product labels against approved label spec

items.description: Allergen-containing products segregated from allergen-free lines
items.evidence_required: Visual inspection of production schedule and physical separation

items.description: Outbound refrigerated product temperature ≤ 4.4°C before loading
items.evidence_required: Temperature check on random outbound cases

items.description: Transport vehicle pre-cooled before loading
items.evidence_required: Check vehicle temperature log and visual inspection
